# Baseline angle

# Transcript
**LOKLHSW
*IIPPODAMA*
*ERASPRYTA*
GRAMATEYEEDO***
*SEIPEPERIWNLE*********

IAKARNANWNKAIKEFAL*********
OIPERITONDHMONTO*********
AINYNKAIENTWIPROS*********
WNDEONTAIPROSAGAG********
NDEXYMBALLESQAITHS*********
IANAGRAUAITWNPOLEWNT*******
THNSTHLHNTHNKOINHNTW*******
ATHSBOYLHSKAIAPODONA******
TAISHKOSAISTHNBOYLHN

KON*RACQENTWNDETOY*
TIANDOXEITWIKOINWI

GRAFHOS******ST*
MACOIEEGRAMENOIEISINP

KATATA*OGMATATWSSYMMACW
IWNPERIDETWNAKARNANWNSK
